# Mixed checkbox and prefix forms

Exercises every recognized checkbox state and numeric-prefix shape so the
parser's checkbox recognition and prefix-stripping logic are pinned end to
end.

## Tasks

- [x] 1. Lowercase checked task with simple numeric prefix
- [X] 2. Uppercase checked task with simple numeric prefix
- [ ] 3. Unchecked task with simple numeric prefix
  - [x] 3.1 Subtask with dotted numeric prefix
  - [ ] 3.2 Unchecked subtask
- [ ] 12. Double-digit numeric prefix
- [ ] Task without numeric prefix
- Task without checkbox or prefix
